serverUrl.label: Server URL
serverUrl.help: Base URL of the ANI server (no trailing slash)

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Permanent API key (aim_ prefix). Bootstrap keys (aimb_) are not supported.

entityId.label: Bot Entity ID
entityId.help: Numeric entity ID on the ANI server (auto-detected if omitted)

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable or disable the ANI channel

textChunkLimit.label: Text Chunk Limit
textChunkLimit.help: Max characters per outbound message chunk (default: 4000)

dm.policy.label: DM Policy
dm.policy.help: Direct message routing policy (open or disabled)
